claim_text: TechFlow delivered the Platform late, going live on 18 November 2024, some seven weeks after the contractual go-live date.

supporting_evidence.summary: Whitfield confirms the Platform did not achieve go-live until 18 November 2024, some seven weeks after the 1 October contractual date.
The go-live readiness email shows the platform was not ready, with open Severity-1 defects, at the contractual date.

legal_explanation: The late-delivery allegation is corroborated by both the independent expert and contemporaneous correspondence. The contractual go-live date and the actual go-live date are not in dispute.
recommended_action: Maintain the pleaded late-delivery allegation; rely on Whitfield and the readiness email.

claim_text: Meridian did not at any time request any change to the agreed scope, and all delay was caused by TechFlow.

challenging_evidence.summary: Change Order No. 3, made at the written request of Meridian dated 21 August 2024, adds the loyalty module and is acknowledged to be a change to the agreed scope of the works, revising the go-live date.

over_extrapolation_risks: The unqualified assertion that Meridian requested no change is directly contradicted by a signed change order.
legal_explanation: The pleaded assertion that Meridian requested no change to scope is contradicted by Change Order No. 3, which records Meridian's own written request for the loyalty module and a consequent revision of the go-live date. This is an own-goal: the claimant's own document undermines the no-change-and-all-TechFlow's-fault narrative.
recommended_action: Withdraw or substantially re-plead the no-scope-change allegation; it is contradicted by the claimant's own signed change order.

claim_text: TechFlow failed to provide adequate training to Meridian's staff in the use of the Platform.
missing_evidence: No training records, attendance sheets, or correspondence evidencing the alleged inadequacy of training.
over_extrapolation_risks: The allegation asserts inadequacy of training without any documentary basis in the bundle.
legal_explanation: There is no evidence in the bundle, one way or the other, addressing the adequacy of training. The allegation is asserted but not addressed by any document.
recommended_action: Either obtain and disclose training records to support the allegation, or withdraw it.
